channel.title: Western Digital — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Western Digital (wdc_psirt).

item.title: CVE-2025-30248 · 8.9 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: DLL hijacking in the WD Discovery Installer in Western Digital WD Discovery 5.2.730 on Windows allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via placement of a crafted dll in the installer's search path.

item.title: CVE-2025-30247 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An OS command injection vulnerability in user interface in Western Digital My Cloud firmware prior to 5.31.108 on NAS platforms allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary system commands via a specially crafted HTTP POST.

item.title: CVE-2024-22170 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unchecked buffer in Dynamic DNS client
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud ddns-start on Linux allows Overflow Buffers.This issue affects My Cloud: before 5.29.102.

item.title: CVE-2024-22169 · 7.1 HIGH — Misconfiguration in node.js causing a code execution in WD Discovery
item.description: WD Discovery versions prior to 5.0.589 contain a misconfiguration in the Node.js environment settings that could allow code execution by utilizing the 'ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE' environment variable. Any malicious application operating with standard user…

item.title: CVE-2024-22168 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability on Western Digital My Cloud and SanDisk ibi Web Apps
item.description: A Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability on the My Cloud, My Cloud Home, SanDisk ibi, and WD Cloud web apps was found which could allow an attacker to redirect the user to a crafted domain and reset their credentials, or to execute arbitrary client…

item.title: CVE-2024-22167 · 7.9 HIGH — SanDisk PrivateAccess DLL Hijacking Vulnerability
item.description: A potential DLL hijacking vulnerability in the SanDisk PrivateAccess application for Windows that could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the system user. This vulnerability is only exploitable locally if an attacker has access to a…

item.title: CVE-2023-22819 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud, My Cloud Home and SanDisk ibi products
item.description: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability issue that could arise by sending crafted requests to a service to consume a large amount of memory, eventually resulting in the service being stopped and restarted was discovered in Western Digital…

item.title: CVE-2023-22817 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Server-side Request Forgery vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud, My Cloud Home and SanDisk ibi products
item.description: Server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that could allow a rogue server on the local network to modify its URL using another DNS address to point back to the loopback adapter. This could then allow the URL to exploit other vulnerabilities on…

item.title: CVE-2023-22818 · 7.3 HIGH — Multiple DLL Search Order hijacking Vulnerabilities in SanDisk Security Installer for Windows
item.description: Multiple DLL Search Order Hijack vulnerabilities were addressed in the SanDisk Security Installer for Windows that could allow attackers with local access to execute arbitrary code by executing the installer in the same folder as the malicious DLL. T…

item.title: CVE-2023-22814 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass issue in My Cloud OS 5 devices
item.description: An authentication bypass issue via spoofing was discovered in the token-based authentication mechanism that could allow an attacker to carry out an impersonation attack. This issue affects My Cloud OS 5 devices: before 5.26.202.

item.title: CVE-2023-22815 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Post-authentication remote command injection vulnerability on Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices
item.description: Post-authentication remote command injection vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices that could allow an attacker to execute code in the context of the root user on vulnerable CGI files. This vulnerability can only be exploited over th…

item.title: CVE-2023-22816 · 6 MEDIUM — Limited Post-Authentication Remote Command Injection in My Cloud Products
item.description: A post-authentication remote command injection vulnerability in a CGI file in Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices that could allow an attacker to build files with redirects and execute larger payloads. This issue affects My Cloud OS 5 devices: befo…

item.title: CVE-2022-36331 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Impersonation attack causing an Authentication Bypass on Western Digital devices
item.description: Western Digital My Cloud, My Cloud Home, My Cloud Home Duo, and SanDisk ibi devices were vulnerable to an impersonation attack that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain access to user data. This issue affects My Cloud OS 5 devices: before…

item.title: CVE-2022-36328 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Path Traversal Vulnerability leading to an arbitrary file read in Western Digital devices
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability that could allow an attacker to create arbitrary shares on arbitrary directories and exfiltrate sensitive files, passwords, users and device configurations w…

item.title: CVE-2022-36327 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Path traversal vulnerability leading to an arbitrary file write in Western Digital devices
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability that could allow an attacker to write files to locations with certain critical filesystem types leading to remote code execution was discovered in Western Di…

item.title: CVE-2022-36326 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Resource Exhaustion Vulnerability in Western Digital devices
item.description: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability issue that could arise by sending crafted requests to a service to consume a large amount of memory, eventually resulting in the service being stopped and restarted was discovered in Western Digital…

item.title: CVE-2022-29840 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Server Side Request Forgery Vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud Devices
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that could allow a rogue server on the local network to modify its URL to point back to the loopback adapter was addressed in Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices. This could allow the URL to exploit…

item.title: CVE-2022-29841 · 8 HIGH — OS Command Injection vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud devices
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability that was caused by a command that read files from a privileged location and created a system command without sanitizing the read data. This comma…

item.title: CVE-2022-29842 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Command Injection Vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud devices
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute code in the context of the root user on a vulnerable CGI file was discovered in Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 de…

item.title: CVE-2022-36329 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Denial of Service over OTA mechanism in Western Digital My Cloud Home and ibi devices
item.description: An improper privilege management issue that could allow an attacker to cause a denial of service over the OTA mechanism was discovered in Western Digital My Cloud Home, My Cloud Home Duo and SanDisk ibi devices.This issue affects My Cloud Home and My…

item.title: CVE-2022-36330 · 1.9 LOW — Buffer Overflow Vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud Home and ibi devices
item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability was discovered on firmware version validation that could lead to an unauthenticated remote code execution in Western Digital My Cloud Home, My Cloud Home Duo and SanDisk ibi devices. An attacker would require exploitat…

item.title: CVE-2023-22813 · 3.3 LOW — Device API endpoint missing access controls on Western Digital Mobile and Web Apps
item.description: A device API endpoint was missing access controls on Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 iOS and Anroid Mobile Apps, My Cloud Home iOS and Android Mobile Apps, SanDisk ibi iOS and Android Mobile Apps, My Cloud OS 5 Web App, My Cloud Home Web App and the Sa…

item.title: CVE-2023-22812 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — SanDisk PrivateAccess Deprecated TLS protocol versions supported
item.description: SanDisk PrivateAccess versions prior to 6.4.9 support insecure TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 protocols which are susceptible to man-in-the-middle attacks thereby compromising confidentiality and integrity of data.

item.title: CVE-2022-29844 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 arbitrary file read and write vulnerability via ftp
item.description: A vulnerability in the FTP service of Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices running firmware versions prior to 5.26.119 allows an attacker to read and write arbitrary files. This could lead to a full NAS compromise and would give remote execution cap…

item.title: CVE-2022-29843 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices Command Injection Vulnerability
item.description: A command injection vulnerability in the DDNS service configuration of Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 devices running firmware versions prior to 5.26.119 allows an attacker to execute code in the context of the root user.

item.title: CVE-2022-23005 · 8.7 HIGH — Host Boot ROM Code Vulnerability in Systems Implementing UFS Boot Feature
item.description: Western Digital has identified a weakness in the UFS standard that could result in a security vulnerability. This vulnerability may exist in some systems where the Host boot ROM code implements the UFS Boot feature to boot from UFS compliant storage…

item.title: CVE-2022-29839 · 4.1 MEDIUM — Remote Backups Application Discloses Stored Credentials
item.description: Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in the remote backups application on Western Digital My Cloud devices that could allow an attacker who has gained access to a relevant endpoint to use that information to access protected data. This…

item.title: CVE-2022-29838 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Authentication issue with the encrypted volumes and auto mount feature in My Cloud devices
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in the encrypted volumes and auto mount features of Western Digital My Cloud devices allows insecure direct access to the drive information in the case of a device reset. This issue affects: Western Digital My Cl…

item.title: CVE-2022-29837 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Path traversal Vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud Home, My Cloud Home Duo and SanDisk ibi Devices
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability was addressed in Western Digital My Cloud Home, My Cloud Home Duo and SanDisk ibi which could allow an attacker to initiate installation of custom ZIP packages and overwrite system files. This could potentially lead to…

item.title: CVE-2022-29836 · 1.9 LOW — Post-Auth Path Traversal Vulnerability Allows to Custom Package Installation via HTTP API
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability was discovered via an HTTP API on Western Digital My Cloud Home; My Cloud Home Duo; and SanDisk ibi devices that could allow an attacker to abuse certain par…

item.title: CVE-2022-23006 · 1.8 LOW — Buffer Overflow Vulnerability in Western Digital My Cloud Home Products and SanDisk ibi
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability was found on Western Digital My Cloud Home, My Cloud Home Duo, and SanDisk ibi that could allow an attacker accessing the system locally to read information from /etc/version file. This vulnerability can on…

item.title: CVE-2022-29835 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WD Discovery's Use of Weak Hashing Algorithm for Code Signing
item.description: WD Discovery software executable files were signed with an unsafe SHA-1 hashing algorithm. An attacker could use this weakness to create forged certificate signatures due to the use of a hashing algorithm that is not collision-free. This could thereb…

item.title: CVE-2022-23004 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Algorithm incorrectly returning error and Invalid unreduced value written to output buffer
item.description: When computing a shared secret or point multiplication on the NIST P-256 curve using a public key with an X coordinate of zero, an error is returned from the library, and an invalid unreduced value is written to the output buffer. This may be leverag…

item.title: CVE-2022-23003 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Shared secret or Point multiplication of NIST P-256 points with X coordinate of zero
item.description: When computing a shared secret or point multiplication on the NIST P-256 curve that results in an X coordinate of zero, the resulting output is not properly reduced modulo the P-256 field prime and is invalid. The resulting output may cause an error…

item.title: CVE-2022-23002 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Point Compression/Decompression of NIST P-256 points with X coordinate of zero
item.description: When compressing or decompressing a point on the NIST P-256 elliptic curve with an X coordinate of zero, the resulting output is not properly reduced modulo the P-256 field prime and is invalid. The resulting output will cause an error when used in o…

item.title: CVE-2022-23001 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Sweet-B Library: Point compress/decompress using the wrong bit for sign
item.description: When compressing or decompressing elliptic curve points using the Sweet B library, an incorrect choice of sign bit is used. An attacker with user level privileges and no other user's assistance can exploit this vulnerability with only knowledge of th…

item.title: CVE-2022-22999 · 8.2 HIGH — Cross-site Scripting Vulnerability in USB Backups App
item.description: Western Digital My Cloud devices are vulnerable to a cross side scripting vulnerability that can allow a malicious user with elevated privileges access to drives being backed up to construct and inject JavaScript payloads into an authenticated user's…

item.title: CVE-2022-23000 · 7.3 HIGH — Weak Default SSL use in Port Forwarding Service
item.description: The Western Digital My Cloud Web App [https://os5.mycloud.com/] uses a weak SSLContext when attempting to configure port forwarding rules. This was enabled to maintain compatibility with old or outdated home routers. By using an "SSL" context instead…

item.title: CVE-2022-22997 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Command Injection Vulnerability on My Cloud Home
item.description: Addressed a remote code execution vulnerability by resolving a command injection vulnerability and closing an AWS S3 bucket that potentially allowed an attacker to execute unsigned code on My Cloud Home devices.

item.title: CVE-2022-22998 · 8 HIGH — Protecting AWS credentials stored in plaintext on My Cloud Home
item.description: Implemented protections on AWS credentials that were not properly protected.

item.title: CVE-2022-22996 · 7.8 HIGH — SanDisk Professional G-RAID 4/8 Software Utility, Privilege Escalation
item.description: The G-RAID 4/8 Software Utility setups for Windows were affected by a DLL hijacking vulnerability. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the system user.

item.title: CVE-2022-22995 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Western Digital My Cloud OS 5 and My Cloud Home Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Write Vulnerability in Netatalk
item.description: The combination of primitives offered by SMB and AFP in their default configuration allows the arbitrary writing of files. By exploiting these combination of primitives, an attacker can execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2022-22994 · 8.8 HIGH — Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity Remote Code Execution Vulnerability on Western Digital My Cloud devices.
item.description: A remote code execution vulnerability was discovered on Western Digital My Cloud devices where an attacker could trick a NAS device into loading through an unsecured HTTP call. This was a result insufficient verification of calls to the device. The v…

item.title: CVE-2022-22992 · 7.8 HIGH — Command Injection Remote Code Execution vulnerability on Western Digital My Cloud devices.
item.description: A command injection remote code execution vulnerability was discovered on Western Digital My Cloud Devices that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary system commands on the device. The vulnerability was addressed by escaping individual argumen…

item.title: CVE-2022-22993 · 7.8 HIGH — Limited Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability on Western Digital My Cloud devices.
item.description: A limited SSRF vulnerability was discovered on Western Digital My Cloud devices that could allow an attacker to impersonate a server and reach any page on the server by bypassing access controls. The vulnerability was addressed by creating a whitelis…

item.title: CVE-2022-22988 · 7.7 HIGH — Insecure file and directory permissions on EdgeRover
item.description: File and directory permissions have been corrected to prevent unintended users from modifying or accessing resources. It would be more difficult for an authenticated attacker to now traverse through the files and directories. This can only be exploit…

item.title: CVE-2022-22990 · 7.8 HIGH — Limited authentication bypass vulnerability on Western Digital My Cloud devices
item.description: A limited authentication bypass vulnerability was discovered that could allow an attacker to achieve remote code execution and escalate privileges on the My Cloud devices. Addressed this vulnerability by changing access token validation logic and rew…

item.title: CVE-2022-22991 · 7.8 HIGH — Command injection through unsecured HTTP calls on Western Digital My Cloud devices
item.description: A malicious user on the same LAN could use DNS spoofing followed by a command injection attack to trick a NAS device into loading through an unsecured HTTP call. Addressed this vulnerability by disabling checks for internet connectivity using HTTP.

item.title: CVE-2022-22989 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Pre-authenticated stack overflow vulnerability on FTP Service
item.description: My Cloud OS 5 was vulnerable to a pre-authenticated stack overflow vulnerability on the FTP service that could be exploited by unauthenticated attackers on the network. Addressed the vulnerability by adding defenses against stack overflow issues.
